name: Brandon, Team Christy
subject: We need to do a lot better, a lot faster.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Christy Smith for Congress
body:
| []()
---

| | Peter --

We launched a big, urgent goal this morning, and we're off to a good start.**But we need to do a lot better, a lot faster.**

Mike Garcia and the Republican machine outraised us in the last filing, and now Donald Trump is doing _everything_ he can to get Garcia elected (including tweets urging his supporters to fill Mike's coffers). We have to act urgently.

This campaign ends in just 11 days. Christy is relying on grassroots supporters like you, Peter, to win this special bellwether election -- not taking a cent from corporate PACs or D.C. lobbyists.

**[We need to raise $1,000,000 to beat Garcia and Donald Trump. Can you chip in $5 or more to help crush this fundraising goal? Every little bit helps.](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bb2e/29776869/a4474e1/569f7ca6/18697621/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA1MDFfbWlsbGlvbmdvYWwyLWZ1bGwifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2005_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200501_milliongoal2-full")** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | [Express Donate $5](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bb2e/29776869/a4474e1/569f7ca7/18697621/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA1MDFfbWlsbGlvbmdvYWwyLWZ1bGwifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2005_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200501_milliongoal2-full&express_lane=true&amount=5") | [Express Donate $25](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bb2e/29776869/a4474e1/569f7ca0/18697621/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA1MDFfbWlsbGlvbmdvYWwyLWZ1bGwifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2005_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200501_milliongoal2-full&express_lane=true&amount=25")
---|---
[Express Donate $50](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bb2e/29776869/a4474e1/569f7ca1/18697621/VEsC/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA1MDFfbWlsbGlvbmdvYWwyLWZ1bGwifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2005_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200501_milliongoal2-full&express_lane=true&amount=50") | [Express Donate $100](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bb2e/29776869/a4474e1/569f7ca2/18697621/VEsD/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA1MDFfbWlsbGlvbmdvYWwyLWZ1bGwifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2005_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200501_milliongoal2-full&express_lane=true&amount=100")
[Express Donate $250](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bb2e/29776869/a4474e1/569f7ca3/18697621/VEsA/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA1MDFfbWlsbGlvbmdvYWwyLWZ1bGwifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2005_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200501_milliongoal2-full&express_lane=true&amount=250") | [Donate Other Amount](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bb2e/29776869/a4474e1/569f7ca6/18697621/VEsB/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA1MDFfbWlsbGlvbmdvYWwyLWZ1bGwifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2005_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200501_milliongoal2-full")
There's one thing Donald Trump's tweets make clear: He's angry.

He's angry that his antics and poor leadership cost his party the House. He's desperate to win this election, to show his supporters and Republican leadership that he's still essential to their survival.

This Toss-Up seat seems like a ripe opportunity for Republicans to show that they have a fighting chance to win back the House this November. That's why they're pumping in so much money.

**If we can hold this seat and defend our majority in the House, it will be one of the strongest rebukes of Trump's presidency and failed leadership during the pandemic.** But we need your help to do it because our campaign is powered by grassroots donors, not corporate PACs, D.C. lobbyists, or dark money groups.

**[If you're ready to tell Donald Trump and Republican leadership that the House is STAYING blue: Help crush our fundraising goal and defend this seat.](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bb2e/29776869/a4474e1/569f7ca6/18697621/VEsO/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA1MDFfbWlsbGlvbmdvYWwyLWZ1bGwifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2005_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200501_milliongoal2-full")**
[DONATE](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bb2e/29776869/a4474e1/569f7ca6/18697621/VEsP/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA1MDFfbWlsbGlvbmdvYWwyLWZ1bGwifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2005_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200501_milliongoal2-full")
Thank you,

Brandon

Brandon Zavala
Campaign Manager, Christy for Congress
[DONATE](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bb2e/29776869/a4474e1/569f7ca6/18697621/VEsHBQ/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA1MDFfbWlsbGlvbmdvYWwyLWZ1bGwifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2005_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200501_milliongoal2-full")

_The number one priority during this time is to make sure everyone helps mitigate the spread of COVID-19 in California and across the country. Our campaign is doing our part by canceling all in-person events, moving to a digital operation, and supporting local efforts to help those in need. Emails like this are a critical part of our ability to run a strong campaign that can win._

name: Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: Welcome to Tea Party Patriots Action - Part 1: We Are Grassroots
body:
**1** **WE’RE GRASSROOTS** **2** **MAKE A DIFFERENCE** **3** **STAY INFORMED** **4** **JOIN WITH OTHERS** | |
---
Thank you for joining us! We’d like to take a moment to tell you more about our nation-wide, grassroots organization: what we stand for, what we envision for our country’s future, and how we can work together to make it happen.

The Tea Party is not a political party, but a movement with the same set of core principles that brought America together at its founding, that kindled the American Dream in the hearts of those who struggled to build our nation, and made the United States of America the greatest, most successful country in world history.

At its root, the American Dream is about freedom. Freedom to work hard and the freedom to keep the fruits of your labor to use as you see fit, without harming others and without hindering their freedom. Very simply, there are three guiding principles that give rise to the freedom necessary to pursue and live the American Dream:
Your Personal Freedom and Your Rights
The right to be free is endowed by our Creator and is the premise of our Constitution, Bill of Rights, and the American way of life. The Constitution is a timeless document that guarantees our basic freedoms. We support personal freedom so all Americans can live life the way they want as long as it does not harm others, or infringe on another’s rights. We are most free when the Constitution is followed and each branch of government serves as a check and balance to the others...
**[Read More »](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMTIzLWVkN2JhM2JiZWIyZjQ0ZDg5N2NkZDhhNmI1ODgzZDEy%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMA%3A%3AaHR0cDovL21haWxjZG4udGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90cy5vcmcvaW1hZ2VzL29uYm9hcmRpbmctd2VsY29tZTEuanBnP21pZD00MTkzMyZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=jjrM_Xm0Gs-D3etKox9pMA)**
[ ](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMTIzLWVkN2JhM2JiZWIyZjQ0ZDg5N2NkZDhhNmI1ODgzZDEy%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90cy5vcmcvb3VydmlzaW9uL3BlcnNvbmFsLWZyZWVkb20_bWlkPTQxOTMzJmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=PCIMStmToYrlq6L2oNvqHw)
|
---
Economic Freedom to Grow Jobs
We stand for economic freedom which means a growing economy with reduced tax rates and reduced government spending so we all have a chance to earn more money and businesses can hire more people. We support policies that allow you to keep more of your own money to do with as you see fit and policies that will provide for and enable opportunities to find good jobs or create and grow businesses. Likewise, we support policies that will present the best chances for the United States to grow and maintain its position as the world leader for economic opportunity...
**[Read More »](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMTIzLWVkN2JhM2JiZWIyZjQ0ZDg5N2NkZDhhNmI1ODgzZDEy%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMg%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90cy5vcmcvb3VydmlzaW9uL2Vjb25vbWljLWZyZWVkb20_bWlkPTQxOTMzJmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=KHexRKZlX3qn54Rqtw6zcg)**
[ ](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMTIzLWVkN2JhM2JiZWIyZjQ0ZDg5N2NkZDhhNmI1ODgzZDEy%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMw%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90cy5vcmcvb3VydmlzaW9uL2Vjb25vbWljLWZyZWVkb20_bWlkPTQxOTMzJmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=roA9-bs44kNLkeCFiyhw2g)
|
---
A Debt Free Future for You and Generations to Come
We support a debt free future because it is only fair and right to pay the debt we have incurred so our children and grandchildren are not stuck with our bills. When the government speaks about “raising the debt ceiling,” they are simply saying they need to borrow more money they won’t ever pay back. Continually increasing the debt of the United States puts an undue and unfair burden on future generations of Americans. It is fair and just to unburden our children from the national debt...
**[Read More »](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMTIzLWVkN2JhM2JiZWIyZjQ0ZDg5N2NkZDhhNmI1ODgzZDEy%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90cy5vcmcvb3VydmlzaW9uL2RlYnQtZnJlZS1mdXR1cmU_bWlkPTQxOTMzJmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=Zl_wGwVtBXJxoPemT1oU2w)**
[ ](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMTIzLWVkN2JhM2JiZWIyZjQ0ZDg5N2NkZDhhNmI1ODgzZDEy%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90cy5vcmcvb3VydmlzaW9uL2RlYnQtZnJlZS1mdXR1cmU_bWlkPTQxOTMzJmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=XAStSd2vGrxw9erLydrDJQ)
|
---
We would like to share with you, over a few emails, how you can become involved in seeing the American Dream realized in your community and our nation. But before we do, take a moment to watch the stories of others that have the same American Dream:
[ ](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMTIzLWVkN2JhM2JiZWIyZjQ0ZDg5N2NkZDhhNmI1ODgzZDEy%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANg%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cueW91dHViZS5jb20vd2F0Y2g_dj1wcXlBbDlDS3NFRSZsaXN0PVBMMm5YQzZ1bzlXVzRESzZrVU52TDZITF9iel9VSTRJQksmbWlkPTQxOTMzJmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=40ukZjFjOFlzjJs4HookRg)
|
---

name: West Virginia Democratic Party
subject: Welcome to our Digital Day of Action!
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by the WV State Democratic Executive Committee (www
body:
3 things to do today!
Fellow Democrat,
Thanks for joining our Digital Day of Action! Now more than ever it's important for Democrats to connect with one another across the state. We can't be in the same places physically, but we can reach out to each other online or by phone!
Democrats can be both safe and successful in 2020 and connecting with one another will enable us to spread our message and get Democrats out to vote!
For today's digital day of action we have 3 action items and of course share all of these asks, our social media graphics, and information to all of your friends and followers!
1\. The last day to register to vote in the Primary Election is May 19! Our first action item is to get 5 to 10 new Democrats registered to vote before the next day of action! If you have trouble recruiting new voters, reach out to those you know and encourage them to check their registration and make sure their information is up to date! You can register to vote online here: [https://ovr.sos.wv.gov/Register/Landing](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17347944/191196191/923597533?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzgyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZWQxNWU5NS03OThjLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lHV6SiB1TCpmx9BKM2ABsooek0xshpQPCuhO4vErInY=&emci=5ad7272d-3b8c-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&emdi=3ed15e95-798c-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&ceid=5094937)
2\. Join our Adopt a Voter campaign in your County! Our Adopt a Voter campaign is important now more than ever. In order to be victorious in 2020, we have to reach our voters. Through this campaign, we will be reaching out to Democratic voters in our counties and ensuring they have all the information they need to cast their ballots in 2020! Sign up here to join our Adopt a Voter campaign or to simply get more information about the program! Link here: [https://bit.ly/AdoptSignUp](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17347945/191196192/-1830386781?fbclid=IwAR2BjaSmhp5sNYJCN9rE9-79_OMHuR5Hi-HMjs7l248dplA84Q5W4RL_koI&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzgyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZWQxNWU5NS03OThjLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lHV6SiB1TCpmx9BKM2ABsooek0xshpQPCuhO4vErInY=&emci=5ad7272d-3b8c-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&emdi=3ed15e95-798c-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&ceid=5094937)
3\. Vote Absentee! Send in your ballot requests and your ballots if you have already received them! If not, contact your County Clerk or the Secretary of State's office! It's important that we are still able to vote and do so safely. You can find all of the deadlines and information on our website at [wvdemocrats.com/wvdemsvote](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17347946/191196193/-1328680479?fbclid=IwAR1wptsB_7t136S83d2A_TDKjx7j_Za0jTDL_L4inbyDHRdymo7Avc8h6EU&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzgyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZWQxNWU5NS03OThjLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lHV6SiB1TCpmx9BKM2ABsooek0xshpQPCuhO4vErInY=&emci=5ad7272d-3b8c-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&emdi=3ed15e95-798c-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&ceid=5094937).
We will be sharing graphics and more information on our social media accounts today. Look for us on Twitter, Facebook, and Instagram: @WVDemocrats!
Thanks for doing your part in making West Virginia a better place by electing Democrats in 2020!
Team WVDP

Paid for and authorized by the WV State Democratic Executive Committee (www.wvdems.org). This communication is not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Public employees may disregard. Contributions are not tax-deductible.
West Virginia Democratic Party
PO Box 11926
Charleston , WV 25339
United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please [unsubscribe](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/5ad7272d-3b8c-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd/3ed15e95-798c-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzgyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZWQxNWU5NS03OThjLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lHV6SiB1TCpmx9BKM2ABsooek0xshpQPCuhO4vErInY=&id=106970630&emailAddress=dpwillis67%40gmail.com).

name: Adem Bunkeddeko
subject: Request your mail-in ballot today
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/PZIqWFRLw4HyeFfpRfDLoGiNUOfSuxOrwZg-G62ZL2U=/e9jD2rAraJeNSElp7iX0NCPt3ukudDquLMQPN7XmC1g=)

Peter,

Last week, the Governor announced that all registered New York voters would receive an absentee ballot application in the mail ahead of the June 23rd primary elections. **[But if you want to get a head start on securing your mail-in ballot, all it takes is a few minutes to apply online today.](https://act.myngp.com/el/PZIqWFRLw4HyeFfpRfDLoGiNUOfSuxOrwZg-G62ZL2U=/cq4QjTCHVhlYiMV4Or0YwWRwQ8JplAdZcjENkhL9wyI=)**

******[CLICK HERE TO APPLY FOR AN ABSENTEE BALLOT ONLINE](https://act.myngp.com/el/PZIqWFRLw4HyeFfpRfDLoGiNUOfSuxOrwZg-G62ZL2U=/cq4QjTCHVhlYiMV4Or0YwWRwQ8JplAdZcjENkhL9wyI=)******

We fought hard for expanded voting access because no one should ever have to choose between exercising their right to vote and protecting their health. And now, New York is making it easy to cast your ballot safely and securely through absentee voting. **[So don't wait -- click here to request your absentee ballot, and get ready to vote for bold, progressive leadership in Washington.](https://act.myngp.com/el/PZIqWFRLw4HyeFfpRfDLoGiNUOfSuxOrwZg-G62ZL2U=/cq4QjTCHVhlYiMV4Or0YwWRwQ8JplAdZcjENkhL9wyI=)**

Best,
Adem

Friend,

Tomorrow, President Trump will go on live television before the entire Nation to hold his FIRST EVER Virtual Presidential Town Hall.

The President knows that he can’t rely on the Fake News media to accurately report the facts about the hard work that his administration has been doing to get us through this difficult time, so he’s decided to take matters into his own hands to make sure the Nation knows the TRUTH.

But, before the President goes on LIVE TV, he wants to get your input.

President Trump requested that we reach out to a few trusted Patriots from around the Country, like YOU, to take our Official Presidential Town Hall Prep Survey to help him prepare.

Your answers will represent the views of EVERY voter in your zip code.
The President wants to make sure he’s discussing the topics that you and your family care about. This survey is only going to a select group so your answers will have a huge impact.

http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=3efd1968fb61286a2ceb508619b8d591b4c589cc5c777021f189bcb4b2b05c9b6bff400c81cc451e08da43ee0e87c1191177e0ec128dabd3

subject: Thank you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by DePasquale for PA 10
body:
I can’t thank you enough for all of your support! Because of you, we were able to hit our April fundraising goal. Our grassroots team makes all the difference in meeting these important deadlines, and I want you to know that I am so grateful.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17350541/191248514/460726911?refcode=em_ty_2020.05.02_b1_ed_all&amount=25&amounts=5,25,50,100,500,1000,2800&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOTNjMjZlNC04ZThjLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FZa2lO9Pstu8rqrippdhJpgEXk9g5dhWWAKzAivePOc=) _We know that COVID-19 has impacted so many in our community, and we have adapted our campaign to this changing environment. During this difficult time, please only consider contributing to our campaign if you’re able to._ Friend,

I can’t thank you enough for all of your support! Because of you, we were able to hit our April fundraising goal. Our grassroots team makes all the difference in meeting these important deadlines, and I want you to know that I am so grateful.

I’m going to be honest, friend: We have big challenges ahead as we look towards November. The special interest groups pouring money into this race are relying on the same playbook they’ve used for years. They think that if they spend enough, they can continue to buy their power and put their own agendas ahead of the people of this district.

_But we’re not going to let that happen, friend._

I’ve seen the dedication and commitment of this grassroots team, and I know that these special interest groups are no match for the people-powered movement we’ve built here in South Central Pennsylvania. By standing together, we can take on any challenge that comes our way. We will flip this seat blue in November, and it will be because we had people like you on this team.

Thank you for always having my back.

\--Eugene | Follow Eugene on social media for campaign updates:

name: MJ Hegar Education Team
subject: Sen. Cornyn and Betsy DeVos
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
Every Texan deserves a good education.

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648900c6/7f51f7bc/4feb18ee/4ef1674f/3540851855/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | Peter, we've got a lot to be proud of when we take a look at Texas' public schools and universities (**MJ herself is a proud Longhorn!**). But instead of standing by our students, **Sen. Cornyn voted to confirm Betsy DeVos and enabled her efforts to steer resources away from our public schools.**

**[If you agree that Texas kids deserve a great education no matter where they live, will you help MJ take on a senator who isn't putting our kids first?](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648900c6/7f51f7bc/4feb18ee/4ef1674e/3540851855/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEzMjYifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-schools?refcode=email_20200502.1nd__1326__&amount=10")**

While Betsy DeVos and Sen. Cornyn worked to funnel money away from Texas' public school classrooms, public school enrollment has been on the rise. That means increasing class sizes, resources stretched thin, teachers and students struggling. In many communities, kids don't have access to the schools Sen. Cornyn favors -- that's why we need a senator who understands the value of public schools and will ensure they don't go underfunded and ignored.

Every family should be able to send their child to a quality public school -- our communities depend on it. **[Donate now, if you're able, to help MJ put our public schools first.](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648900c6/7f51f7bc/4feb18ee/4ef1674e/3540851855/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEzMjYifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-schools?refcode=email_20200502.1nd__1326__&amount=10")** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
---

name: Blue Georgia
subject: key race alert (FiveThirtyEight update)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warnock for Georgia
body:
| | |
---
**Friend: Nate Silver's FiveThirtyEight has now _confirmed_ that Senate control is up for grabs - and it could all come down to Georgia. **
That's why Mitch McConnell and Republicans are zeroing in on Georgia's Senate race - and why the GOP candidate has pledged to spend _$20 MILLION _of her personal fortune to buy this seat and strengthen McConnell's grip on power.
Reverend Raphael Warnock (D) is the strong leader Democrats need to win this race and take back the Senate - but Republicans are pulling out all the stops to defeat him. Simply put, they're _terrified_ that McConnell's majority is in serious danger.
**That's why this news couldn't have come at a better time:** **A generous group of donors has stepped up to EXTEND OUR MATCH, doubling every dollar up to $10,000, to flip Georgia blue and take back the Senate for Democrats.**
But this match opportunity is expiring, and we're still falling incredibly short of what we need to fight back against GOP attacks and retake the Senate by winning in Georgia. **The only way we win is if grassroots donors like you give right now:**
**[So please, friend: With time running out to have every dollar DOUBLED before our midnight deadline, will you give $5 or more right now- as much as you can afford - to flip Georgia blue and take back the Senate for Democrats?](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.com/page/m/60b3e7eb/288179be/a598e56/348e9077/2606440208/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoid2Fybm9jay1mb3ItZ2VvcmdpYV9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoianRrMTkzLWZyLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAiLCJlM3NnWVdKeVpXTjFjbkpwYm1jZ2ZYMD0iOiIifQ%3D%3D/?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/warnock-for-georgia_email?refcode=jtk193-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500") In a race this close, e****very dollar could make the difference between winning and losing - thank you for taking advantage of this critical match opportunity so we can end McConnell's majority once and for all.**

subject: URGENT: Please read
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:

**
**Deadline to make 5X impact is EXTENDED for select supporters****
**[**MAKE 5X IMPACT NOW**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001oqld4P5-t0SkDW1eDzAMKBWY8T4N81qehdqEuVDyLH9rvrk-mCh6K4A1wO1h2KG8pnUDXVVabcdsb-E16osiztKGlIwS6q0FEgtzeL4lV6kfFEvIQoRrGfLAQMCsONlJDwjSkev8opDd7rfzumI3xNjHX74-r--SAlz-AGjIJk-7v9wAigAsdT9DxF4Yd01bZpyRpdEFRWOwWr8HSn8ZMi9K93oKnGJN5rQoFJStCzLL5kqUKoew4jBahjdUekOUzU_jLBGP1eww079MoXIxY9hjM3wEKBIuR2aQauDr1iKgDKnbVTqF1RZEktDc_GTr6iJZ02UTCwMkKDjs4jG9whXW8cGZuUIkeeuDi3eYhA1MJupoIBYsUmFnpvooxTvBmjKYSbZs1gx2LFxAIllcLAKpxmYW1xjJAUZCVlTYDcCwIVa9HJsLBaXy-GeA_TYA3KzZpVPVPDBxAm7WY0Qpr3GkCzWhn1Wu&c=jWLH0S00AHEWNLNFgpFF90awC50jovxRv7tAeW9HfAuROkl9TTGXoA==&ch=Oa_7PEXZ-bmjqiTholl-TtU3e9hN8VXibFK9H-XTY-JQG4o7jqm4EQ==)**
---

Friend, I wanted to forward a message I sent a year ago today. Much has changed, but what's important remains the same: _I 'm running for Congress to fight for lower taxes, responsible reforms, affordable healthcare, and to give conservative Californians a voice in Congress._

Whether you read it then or this is your first time, I want you to know just how thankful I am to have you on the team. It is only because of your continued support -- _whether you 've been volunteering, donating, following along on social media, or reading these emails! -- that we've been able to tackle challenges head on_.

Because of you the media is calling this the "Marquee Fight" to watch in November.
Because of you pundits are calling this race a toss-up.
Because of you flipping this seat is our best chance at taking back the House Majority.

But this isn't just about one seat. It's about reclaiming the House Majority, getting our nation back on track, and putting an end to the Left's socialist agenda for good. That's why we need a strong, conservative voice to Congress who will fight for our values, no matter how hard.

We are fighting to do just that, but we can't do it alone. [**If you are able, can you chip in $5 for Victory on November 3rd?**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001D8JmREoshzhDu_ubECoPFo4vmZi8Fbi8BdKuQHONTzgMOYF55FIgLWTpyT0uTGjv_sB5crAlq6oWF4rqZReR-h2-oGkUENXg3FMMrMXZROB3yqnLNwnZP1Ie5yMZ0T8aPH8RzKWot6jOu0SBfqas2ndfTIGdY3Wy9zyCErg814Ur8_TTFR3fOQY2vSVqeb4xE_chl-djFqsnAh4ppf_bUDen3v4-ad0-TWubdqGmxZComu_aKLhYK19yX6EXo2xMoPjr52cZBpYy_X-VniwNc1fdhBxMZxPPhWunJ7MOPYOigQTnzBf9h3e494HDnpqWaThqyPnq6KwAZQqL65fNCNEiOTiZZr540l0JVqCW9EQ=&c=PB27ecBwE7SsFQ3ORSv03jJbtewBjuPoPrJk2HThoIi5396Y-SandQ==&ch=kiYBGpMHH2qOlJ-5MMHVxKo691zZuBHCuoeWIWkc6GoUvfDmm7fHsw==)

I am so proud of what we've accomplished, but our biggest battle is still ahead. As we move forward, I hope you remember just how much your dedication means to me.

Thank you for all that you do, |

Michelle Steel

We need common-sense reform, not liberal dreams that end up costing taxpayers millions.
We need a champion for Orange County families, not a Pelosi puppet._

Friend,

All of Team McSally wanted to reach out to say **THANK YOU!**

We're fighting an uphill battle to defend Arizona's Senate seat, and thanks to the generous support of grassroots conservatives like YOU, we've been able to make up critical ground this month. As long as we have you with us, we can WIN in November!

Supporters like you are the lifeblood of our campaign. Every donation, no matter how small, helps us spread the conservative message, and fight back against our well-funded challenger's vicious smears and attacks. **_The resources you 're providing are essential._**

Martha's far-left opponent entered 2020 as the top Senate fundraiser in the country - but he does things a little differently. Liberal megadonors and Hollywood progressives are powering his campaign. On top of that, Chuck Schumer has promised to pour millions into helping him win Arizona before Election Day. We're grateful for the contributions you have made to our movement already, but if you're able to chip in today it will help our chances of coming out on top in November.

| A Message from Matt!
---
It's been a busy couple weeks for our campaign! Our Power of Prayer event was a huge success. A big thank you to the hundreds of people from around the state tuned in to come together as a community and pray with us! The NRCC, announced me as an On the Radar candidate in their Young Guns Program. We also announced the endorsement of former Arkansas Governor Mike Huckabee. Governor Huckabee is a strong Conservative voice for our nation and I could not be more excited to welcome him to the team. Finally, we released first quarter FEC filings and we were proud to announce that our campaign had raised the most in-state money and had the most NH donors of any candidate in the race. I hope that everyone is staying safe and healthy and thank you for your support!
\- Matt

| Mike Huckabee Endorses Matt Mayberry for Congress
---
When I first ran for President in 2008, one of the first people I met was Matt Mayberry, a man who would become and remain a dear personal friend as well as political ally. Matt is one of the hardest workers I’ve seen in 30 years of being in politics. He is a rarity in the political world—he has a servant’s heart and does his work selflessly and without regard to whether he’s recognized or compensated for what his labor is worth. He is a person of actual principled conviction. The people of New Hampshire would be very fortunate to have Matt Mayberry in Congress. For that matter, we ALL would be fortunate to have someone of his character serve. When others seek the spotlight, Matt seeks the task others don’t want to do because it is done in obscurity. With great joy, I enthusiastically endorse Matt Mayberry and respectfully ask you to vote for him and support him financially as I am doing both personally and through my PAC. Matt will consistently put others first. He always has. I believe he always will. Sincerely, Mike Huckabee

[9:32 AM - Apr 20, 2020]() |
---|---|---|---
| Good Morning Friends. As we face another week ahead, when you go to the grocery store, please don't forget to pick up some NH milk products. It looks like (and there could be others, so correct me) HP Hood is processing milk from New Hampshire farmers. Instead of reaching for that pint of ice cream from Vermont how about grabbing a half gallon of ice cream that supports our NH dairy farmers. Also Walpole Creamery, owned by our friend Robert Kasper, is a GREAT (and delicious) NH option for the midnight pint of ice cream grabbers!! I'm updating the milk industry ad that says: Milk does a body good. Well, NH milk does the body, mind and soul even better!! If you know of other companies highlighting NH milk and milk products PLEASE add them in the comments. Thank you Union Leader for highlighting this story.
---

clean_body: | | | | | | | | | | Mayberry For Congress Campaign Newsletter | | | | | A Message from Matt! It's been a busy couple weeks for our campaign! Our Power of Prayer event was a huge success. A big thank you to the hundreds of people from around the state tuned in to come together as a community and pray with us! The NRCC, announced me as an On the Radar candidate in their Young Guns Program. We also announced the endorsement of former Arkansas Governor Mike Huckabee. Governor Huckabee is a strong Conservative voice for our nation and I could not be more excited to welcome him to the team. Finally, we released first quarter FEC filings and we were proud to announce that our campaign had raised the most in-state money and had the most NH donors of any candidate in the race. I hope that everyone is staying safe and healthy and thank you for your support! \- Matt | | | | | | Watch our latest video! | | | | | | | | | | | | In the news! | | | | | | | | Mike Huckabee Endorses Matt Mayberry for Congress When I first ran for President in 2008, one of the first people I met was Matt Mayberry, a man who would become and remain a dear personal friend as well as political ally. Matt is one of the hardest workers I’ve seen in 30 years of being in politics. He is a rarity in the political world—he has a servant’s heart and does his work selflessly and without regard to whether he’s recognized or compensated for what his labor is worth. He is a person of actual principled conviction. The people of New Hampshire would be very fortunate to have Matt Mayberry in Congress. For that matter, we ALL would be fortunate to have someone of his character serve. When others seek the spotlight, Matt seeks the task others don’t want to do because it is done in obscurity. With great joy, I enthusiastically endorse Matt Mayberry and respectfully ask you to vote for him and support him financially as I am doing both personally and through my PAC. Matt will consistently put others first. He always has. I believe he always will. Sincerely, Mike Huckabee | | | | | | | | The NRCC's Young Guns program is a recruitment program led by House Republican Leader Kevin McCarthy that identifies US Congressional Candidates with the best chances of winning this Fall and returning a Republican Majority to Congress. | | | | | | Pics from the campaign trail! | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Social media post of the week! | | | | | | | | | Matt Mayberry for NH [9:32 AM - Apr 20, 2020]() | ---|---|---|--- | Good Morning Friends. As we face another week ahead, when you go to the grocery store, please don't forget to pick up some NH milk products. It looks like (and there could be others, so correct me) HP Hood is processing milk from New Hampshire farmers. Instead of reaching for that pint of ice cream from Vermont how about grabbing a half gallon of ice cream that supports our NH dairy farmers. Also Walpole Creamery, owned by our friend Robert Kasper, is a GREAT (and delicious) NH option for the midnight pint of ice cream grabbers!! I'm updating the milk industry ad that says: Milk does a body good. Well, NH milk does the body, mind and soul even better!! If you know of other companies highlighting NH milk and milk products PLEASE add them in the comments. Thank you Union Leader for highlighting this story. [As milk gets dumped nationally, dairy farmers in NH nervous about their futures during COVID-19 pandemic]() [With news of milk being dumped across the country, Granite State dairy farmers are nervous about their futures in the coming months as America goes through the COVID-19 pandemic.]() | | | | | | | | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|--- | | | | | | Social Media Endorsements of the Week! | | | | | | Tell your friends that you support Matt's campaign - tag in an endorsement post on social media. | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Campaign Events! | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Paid For By Matt Mayberry for Congress | | | Matt Mayberry for Congress | | P.O. Box 1776, Dover NH 03821 United States | | | ---|---|---

name: Team Warner
subject: Weekly Update
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
|
---
| | | If you would like more information about how to slow and stop the spread of COVID-19, **[take a look at these resources from the Centers for Disease Control (CDC).](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d4d7/53d9897e/54f49675/1c886cb0/2527212878/VEsH/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://www.cdc.gov/coronavirus/2019-ncov/index.html")**
---
Derek --

We hope you and your loved ones are staying safe and healthy during this uncertain time. Virginia has seen a rise in coronavirus cases this week, but we've also seen a rise in available testing for folks across the Commonwealth. Team Warner urges folks to continue to follow public health directives so that we can work together to slow and stop the spread of coronavirus.

**Here 's what Mark is working on to make sure every Virginian has access to the resources they need during this difficult time:**
* Mark joined colleagues from the House and Senate in calling for a **[historic investment in rural broadband](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d4d7/53d9897e/54f49675/1c886cbf/2527212878/VEsE/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://www.starexponent.com/news/historic-investment-sought-for-internet-access/article_022862e3-21b3-5c7f-8e11-02e4c7344ad6.html")**. This pandemic has made the disparities in reliable internet access clearer than ever, and Mark is working hard to ensure that every Virginian -- and every American -- has equal access.

* Mark joined other Democratic colleagues in pushing to ensure that **[minority and underserved communities are included in Paycheck Protection Program (PPP) funding.](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d4d7/53d9897e/54f49675/1c886cbe/2527212878/VEsF/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://www.wavy.com/10-on-your-side/us-senators-push-to-expand-opportunities-for-coronavirus-relief-funding-for-minority-underserved-communities/")** Low- and moderate-income communities and communities of color are experiencing disproportionate impacts from coronavirus, and it's critical that we send relief funding accordingly.

* Mark supported **[Johns Hopkins University's new Testing Insights Initiative](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d4d7/53d9897e/54f49675/1c886cbd/2527212878/VEsC/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://coronavirus.jhu.edu/testing/testing-faq/general-public#who-started-the-testing-insights-initiative-and-why")**, a comprehensive hub of information about available coronavirus testing. This hub will be a critical resource for local and federal legislators and public health officials as they make decisions about our path forward.

* **[Increases in coronavirus testing and personal protective equipment (PPE)](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d4d7/53d9897e/54f49675/1c886cbc/2527212878/VEsD/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://www.wavy.com/news/politics/virginia-politics/sen-warner-covid-19-testing-and-ppe-shortages-must-be-addressed-before-virginia-will-reopen/")** are a necessary step to re-opening the economy. Mark has called for any plan to re-open the country to take into account advice from public health professionals and consider all of the available data.

* Mark and Senator Tim Kaine **[sent a letter to the United States Department of Agriculture (USDA)](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d4d7/53d9897e/54f49675/1c886cbb/2527212878/VEsA/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://www.wavy.com/news/health/coronavirus/us-sens-warner-kaine-ask-dept-of-agriculture-to-approve-virginias-pandemic-ebt-program-request/")** urging the agency to approve a program that would ensure that children who rely on free or reduced-cost school lunches will have access to healthy food during the ongoing public health crisis.

* As folks across the country file for unemployment in record numbers, Mark continues to work with Senators Bernie Sanders, Doug Jones, and Richard Blumenthal on the **[Paycheck Security Act](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d4d7/53d9897e/54f49675/1c886cba/2527212878/VEsB/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://wtop.com/congress/2020/04/could-your-paycheck-be-guaranteed-by-the-federal-government/")** , which would guarantee paychecks to workers who have been laid off or furloughed during the pandemic.

* Mark joined his Senate colleagues in **[pressing for more information about how the Trump administration plans to expand teleworking access](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d4d7/53d9897e/54f49675/1c886cb9/2527212878/VEsO/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://www.politico.com/news/2020/04/28/democrats-federal-worker-safety-215733")** for federal employees and evaluate when it's safe for these folks to return to work.

Your kind words and support keep our team moving forward -- thank you from everyone on Team Warner!

Be well,

Team Warner
|
---

[](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d4d7/53d9897e/54f49675/1c886cb8/2527212878/VEsP/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://markwarnerva.com") Friends of Mark Warner
1490-5A Quarterpath Road #213
Williamsburg, VA 23185

[Unsubscribe](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d4d7/53d9897e/54f49675/1c886ca7/2527212878/VEsHBQ/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://act.markwarnerva.com/unsubscribe")

name: Charles Booker
subject: What to expect in May
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
Now that it’s May — our last full month to campaign before the primary — we’re going to have to fight even harder. The truth is that we are expecting this to be our most challenging month yet.
#
First off, I want to say**thank you. **
Thanks to the hard work of our supporters, we were able to hit our big April fundraising goal. Please know how much it means to me that you’re standing next to me in this fight.
I’m so proud of this movement and I can’t wait to see the look on Mitch McConnell’s face when he realizes WE are the campaign that will end his reign in the Senate once and for all.
But now that it’s May — our last full month to campaign before the primary — we’re going to have to fight even harder. **The truth is that we are expecting this to be our most challenging month yet. **
This is the time when the establishment will ramp up their efforts to write off our campaign, criticize our progressive values, and try to speak for the people of Kentucky. This is the time when Mitch McConnell will dump millions into attack ads and ask his billionaire friends to flood this race with dark money.
**And it’s time for us to show everyone how serious we are about bold, progressive change and picking a real Democratic candidate to challenge Mitch McConnell.**
**[Will you show you’re in this fight with me and add your name to give your personal endorsement? Our power comes from people like you](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17352730/191312282/1217486649?source=em20200502&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMzQ2ODE5ZC1hYThjLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VGe9EE7msxJsz7XYea5kJd-Owuk-RM_mN0OwGwsTyiw=&emci=5441f805-a88c-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&emdi=a346819d-aa8c-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&ceid=2635570)[.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17352731/191312283/1217486649?source=em20200502&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMzQ2ODE5ZC1hYThjLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VGe9EE7msxJsz7XYea5kJd-Owuk-RM_mN0OwGwsTyiw=&emci=5441f805-a88c-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&emdi=a346819d-aa8c-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&ceid=2635570)**
**[endorse our campaign](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17352732/191312284/1217486649?source=em20200502&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMzQ2ODE5ZC1hYThjLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VGe9EE7msxJsz7XYea5kJd-Owuk-RM_mN0OwGwsTyiw=&emci=5441f805-a88c-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&emdi=a346819d-aa8c-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&ceid=2635570)**
To be honest with you, we expect to be outspent this primary. We might not have as much money as our opponents, but we don’t believe that’s the answer to defeating Mitch McConnell.
It’s going to take a people-powered movement to topple Mitch’s reign. We need to excite the people who’ve been on the sidelines of our elections, the young people of Kentucky, and everyone who has felt powerless under Mitch.
We believe we have the message to create that kind of excitement, but first we need to show how many folks are already on our side.
**[If you agree that it’s time to pass Medicare for All, build an economy that works for all of us, and elect a Senate that works for people and not profits — will you personally endorse our campaign today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17352733/191312285/1217486649?source=em20200502&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMzQ2ODE5ZC1hYThjLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VGe9EE7msxJsz7XYea5kJd-Owuk-RM_mN0OwGwsTyiw=&emci=5441f805-a88c-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&emdi=a346819d-aa8c-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&ceid=2635570)**
**[endorse our campaign](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17352734/191312286/1217486649?source=em20200502&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMzQ2ODE5ZC1hYThjLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VGe9EE7msxJsz7XYea5kJd-Owuk-RM_mN0OwGwsTyiw=&emci=5441f805-a88c-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&emdi=a346819d-aa8c-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&ceid=2635570)**
Thank you for everything,
Charles Booker

****[Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17352735/191312287/-1287208699?refcode=em20200502-footer&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMzQ2ODE5ZC1hYThjLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VGe9EE7msxJsz7XYea5kJd-Owuk-RM_mN0OwGwsTyiw=)****
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17352736/191312288/-640535987?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMzQ2ODE5ZC1hYThjLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VGe9EE7msxJsz7XYea5kJd-Owuk-RM_mN0OwGwsTyiw=&emci=5441f805-a88c-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&emdi=a346819d-aa8c-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&ceid=2635570) | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17352737/191312289/-778353598?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMzQ2ODE5ZC1hYThjLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VGe9EE7msxJsz7XYea5kJd-Owuk-RM_mN0OwGwsTyiw=&emci=5441f805-a88c-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&emdi=a346819d-aa8c-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&ceid=2635570) | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17352738/191312290/-1403296926?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMzQ2ODE5ZC1hYThjLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VGe9EE7msxJsz7XYea5kJd-Owuk-RM_mN0OwGwsTyiw=&emci=5441f805-a88c-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&emdi=a346819d-aa8c-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&ceid=2635570)

name: Team Kennedy
subject: "The postal service is a joke" - Donald Trump
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kennedy for Massachusetts
body:
| [](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/36390674/55b66746/200b0d9d/80e53a8/307254587/VEsH/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "http://www.kennedyforma.com/")
---

| | While sitting in the Oval Office, the President of the United States said: **" The postal service is a joke."** We already knew the postal service was in trouble, but now the president is outwardly attacking it. We can't let this happen. Now, more than ever, we are relying on the USPS and those delivering packages each and every day. **Will you add your name to our petition demanding we preserve, fund, and protect the USPS:[Click here to add your name >> ](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/36390674/55b66746/200b0d9d/80e53ab/307254587/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/s/save-the-usps-e/#firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&subsource=pet-2020-04-save-the-usps-email-2")** It's no coincidence that the president has decided to wage an all-out assault on this essential institution just as vote by mail became a national topic. This president's latest voter suppression tactic is dangerous -- to our health and our democracy. He knows exactly what he is doing each and every time he makes threats to the postal service. We can't let this president's threats become a reality. We must stand together and protect the United States Postal Service. Team Kennedy [add your name](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/36390674/55b66746/200b0d9d/80e53ab/307254587/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/s/save-the-usps-e/#firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&subsource=pet-2020-04-save-the-usps-email-2") |
---|---|---

---|---

PO Box 15, Boston, MA 02137.

name: Holcomb Crew
subject: re: more stories about Hoosiers stepping up
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eric Holcomb for Indiana
body:
There are truly amazing things happening in Indiana right now and there are incredible stories of sacrifice, resilience, and charity to be told. | | |
---|---|---
Friend,

_Did you see these incredible stories about Hoosiers stepping up to help their neighbors get through our COVID-19 crisis? _

**If not, don’t worry — the Holcomb Crew has your back. Everyone could use a little bit of good news these days and we want to spread these stories as far as we can.**

_This is where you come in. We need your help to make sure as many Hoosiers see this news as possible. _

We had our team pull some of our favorite stories below. If you want to help us spread the good news, please share one of them on Twitter with your friends and family!

name: Pete Buttigieg
subject: We have to do everything in our power to make sure we elect leaders who will stand up for us in challenging times. And that means electing Sara Gideon to the U.S. Senate.
body:
We have a chance to build the era that comes next -- an era where all Americans, no matter how much money they make...
# [](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/658028f9/4bef7a87/6c10f8b3/287e49be/892651712/VEsH/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-email-template?refcode=em_header")

**Did you get a chance to read this note from Pete Buttigieg? If not, read his email below and then make a contribution to help Democrats take back the Senate.**
**********[CONTRIBUTE](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/658028f9/4bef7a87/6c10f8b3/287e49bd/892651712/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMDA1MDItMS1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-may-2020?refcode=em200502-1-full")**********
Friends,
This November, we have a chance not only to defeat President Trump, but also to take back the Senate for Democrats so we can finally start making progress on the issues that motivated us to get in this fight in the first place.
It's our chance to build the era that comes next -- an era where all Americans, no matter where they live or how much money they make, can access quality health care. We can launch an era in which anyone can get a good education without being saddled with student loans for the rest of their life.
**But we can 't do any of that with Mitch McConnell as Majority Leader.**
That's why I'm personally reaching out to you to ask you to help Sara Gideon win in Maine and flip this Senate seat.
**[Please make a contribution of any amount you can afford right now. I promise, every donation makes a difference, no matter the amount.](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/658028f9/4bef7a87/6c10f8b3/287e49bd/892651712/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMDA1MDItMS1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-may-2020?refcode=em200502-1-full")**
Look, I know that for many of you, politics is probably the last thing you want to hear about right now. It's understandable to want to turn the news off and step away entirely during these stressful and uncertain times.
But we have to do everything in our power to make sure we elect leaders who will stand up for us in the face of challenge.
**[So please, chip in to support Sara Gideon's campaign, and together we will regain a Democratic majority.](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/658028f9/4bef7a87/6c10f8b3/287e49bd/892651712/VEsC/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMDA1MDItMS1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-may-2020?refcode=em200502-1-full")**
I'm hoping that you are staying safe and hopeful during these tough times. We will make it through this, together.
All my best,
Pete Buttigieg
Former Mayor of South Bend, Indiana
Former Democratic Candidate for President

* * *
Sara Gideon for Maine
PO Box 812
South Freeport, ME 04078

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important tool for our campaign, but if you'd like to receive fewer emails please **[click here](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/658028f9/4bef7a87/6c10f8b3/287e49bc/892651712/VEsD/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://gideon.bsd.net/page/s/receive-fewer-emails/")**. If you'd like to stop receiving messages from the campaign **[you can unsubscribe here](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/658028f9/4bef7a87/6c10f8b3/287e49b3/892651712/VEsA/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "http://act.saragideon.com/page/unsubscribe/")**. Our campaign doesn't accept corporate PAC money, so if you can make a contribution today, it'd mean a lot. **[Chip in here](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/658028f9/4bef7a87/6c10f8b3/287e49b2/892651712/VEsB/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-email-template?refcode=em_footer")**

name: Tom Cotton
subject: It’s not xenophobia to call out China
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cotton for Senate 2226 Cottondale Lane
body:
Over the past few weeks, the Washington Post has been attacking me for pointing out the real possibility that the China virus originated as a leak from a Chinese lab. Yesterday, I wrote a letter addressing these attacks and made it clear that it's not xenophobic to call out China; in fact, it's the right thing to do. I wanted to share the letter so you can see why I continue to stand up to China.Click here to unsubscribe http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/servlet/OneClickOptOutServlet?m=42409662&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc2MDE1NTc2NgS2&mt=1&rt=0 Peter,

Over the past few weeks, the Washington Post has been attacking me for pointing out the real possibility that the China virus originated as a leak from a Chinese lab.

Yesterday, I wrote a letter addressing these attacks and made it clear that it's not xenophobic to call out China; in fact, it's the right thing to do.

I wanted to share the letter so you can see why I continue to stand up to China.
http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDI0MDk2NjIS1&kn=9&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=2&j=MTc2MDE1NTc2NgS2&mt=1&rt=0 http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDI0MDk2NjIS1&kn=3&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=2&j=MTc2MDE1NTc2NgS2&mt=1&rt=0 The Post has printed several articles opposing my suggestion that the United States restrict Chinese nationals from studying advanced scientific and technological subjects in our country.
“It’s hard to know what triggered Cotton’s rant,” Catherine Rampell wrote in her April 28 op-ed, “Restricting student visas is nonsensical,” resorting to ad hominem cries of “xenophobia.” Ms. Rampell didn’t bother to mention Chinese espionage until the last paragraph of her column.
Here’s context: About 370,000 Chinese nationals are studying in the United States. Nearly half are studying in scientific and technological fields. The Chinese government pressures some of these students into becoming spies. The FBI is investigating 1,000 cases related to China’s intellectual property theft across the country. The Chinese military has sent at least 500 military researchers to the United States, often under false identities.
The United States has responded to similar threats by restricting what students from adversary nations can study. Scientific exchange between the Soviet Union and the United States was highly restricted, and it was exploited by the Soviet Union. President Barack Obama signed legislation barring Iranian students from studying nuclear science. I don’t recall accusations of xenophobia directed at him.
The Chinese Communist Party is our enemy. It aims to displace the United States as the world’s preeminent economic and military power. We ought not aid that ambition. Yet that’s exactly what we’re doing when we open our most advanced labs to Chinese nationals.

In service,

Tom
Paid for by Cotton for Senate 2226 Cottondale Lane
Suite 200
Little Rock, AR 72202

Senator Cotton was honorably discharged from the U.S. Army. Images do not imply endorsement by the Department of Defense or any service branch.

Privacy Policy http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDI0MDk2NjIS1&kn=2&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=2&j=MTc2MDE1NTc2NgS2&mt=1&rt=0
Unsubscribe http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/servlet/OneClickOptOutServlet?m=42409662&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc2MDE1NTc2NgS2&mt=1&rt=0

Friend,

Having the strength of a leader who is willing to put America First is absolutely paramount at a time like this.

While Democrats and the liberal media are shamelessly politicizing the Coronavirus outbreak, President Trump is hard at work to Keep America SAFE for ALL Americans:
- In January, he quickly closed down our borders to China
- He signed the CARES Act into law to provide immediate relief for Americans
- All of our Nation’s borders are temporarily closed to non-US Citizens
- Military hospital ships have been deployed to cities overwhelmed with patients
- He has provided strict guidelines to re-open our Nation
- And, he is providing daily updates to the American People.We know that there is a light at the end of this long, dark tunnel, and as long as we stick together, our Nation will emerge STRONGER than ever before.

name: Team Christy
subject: Hillary's in. Amy's in. Are you, Peter?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Christy Smith for Congress
body:
| []()
---

| | Peter --

We have some breaking news updates to give to you -- there's no slowing down on these last 10 days before our election.

**First,** we found out from pre-primary reports that **Mike Garcia outraised us.**

**Then,** Donald Trump tweeted his support of Garcia and asked his millions of Twitter followers to support his campaign (again!).

**Now,** Hillary Clinton and Amy Klobuchar have joined Pete Buttigieg, Kirsten Gillibrand, Kamala Harris, and Elizabeth Warren in supporting Christy Smith for Congress. It's great news, but it won't nearly be enough if we don't raise enough money over these last few days.

**[We need to raise $1 million online by May 12th to keep this Toss-Up seat and deny Trump any momentum. Rush a donation now>>](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bb2a/29776869/a47fb7d/569f7ebe/3518397951/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA1MDJfbWlsbGlvbmdvYWwzLUZ1bGwifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2005_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200502_milliongoal3-Full")** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | [Express Donate $5](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bb2a/29776869/a47fb7d/569f7ebf/3518397951/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA1MDJfbWlsbGlvbmdvYWwzLUZ1bGwifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2005_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200502_milliongoal3-Full&express_lane=true&amount=5") | [Express Donate $25](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bb2a/29776869/a47fb7d/569f7eb8/3518397951/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA1MDJfbWlsbGlvbmdvYWwzLUZ1bGwifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2005_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200502_milliongoal3-Full&express_lane=true&amount=25")

[Express Donate $250](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bb2a/29776869/a47fb7d/569f7ebb/3518397951/VEsA/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA1MDJfbWlsbGlvbmdvYWwzLUZ1bGwifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2005_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200502_milliongoal3-Full&express_lane=true&amount=250") | [Donate Other Amount](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bb2a/29776869/a47fb7d/569f7ebe/3518397951/VEsB/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA1MDJfbWlsbGlvbmdvYWwzLUZ1bGwifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2005_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200502_milliongoal3-Full")

name: Rick Kennedy
subject: Thank you!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rick Kennedy for Congress
body:
I just wanted to reach out and say thank you, team. We set our monthly goal, and you all stepped up and helped get us over the line. Now, because of folks like you, we’re starting December on firm footing.
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17353747/191370484/-276570889?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83NDEzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2Y2MxZDViMC1jODhjLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FtajZ6NTM2pCOAtFK6armZpBaOgohHLFM-NxJHW0o-0=&emci=9ba14963-b68c-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&emdi=6cc1d5b0-c88c-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&ceid=10438639)
---
Dear Friend, I want to thank you for your support. We came close to our monthly goal, and I deeply appreciate all of your contributions. If there's one thing my athletic career taught me - **if you meet every goal you set, you're not challenging yourself enough.** This election will present a stark choice to the people of Central Texas - a return to competence and confidence, or a continuation of our descent into chaos. I'm going to keep fighting like hell for our future and for the future of America. I hope you'll keep fighting with me. Thank you, Rick
| Paid for by Rick Kennedy for Congress
---

name: POLL [re: Dr. Fauci]
subject: Do you agree with Dr. Fauci?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by 314 Action Fund, 314action
body:
| As you know, states across the country our planning on reopening this month.

**But:** Dr. Fauci warned that if states rush to reopen without adhering to federal guidelines, they're taking a significant risk.

**Amid a pandemic, we think prioritizing people 's health and safety is most important. _But what do you think?_**

[Do you agree with Dr. Fauci that states must adhere to federal guidelines before opening back up?](https://secure.314action.%3D/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.314action.org/page/s/fauci-poll-may-2020?firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&city=&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&&&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=1+-+Do+you+agree+with+Dr+Fauci+that+states+m&utm_campaign=314_EM_SV_200502_1MO_1MC_STD_none_4_faucipoll&source=314_EM_SV_200502_1MO_1MC_STD_none_4_faucipoll&refcode=314_EM_SV_200502_1MO_1MC_STD_none_4_faucipoll")

| [Yes](https://secure.314action.%3D/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.314action.org/page/s/fauci-poll-may-2020?firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&city=&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&&&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=2+-+Yes&utm_campaign=314_EM_SV_200502_1MO_1MC_STD_none_4_faucipoll&source=314_EM_SV_200502_1MO_1MC_STD_none_4_faucipoll&refcode=314_EM_SV_200502_1MO_1MC_STD_none_4_faucipoll")

---

Team, we all want everything to go back to normal. But the way to get back to normal AND protect as many people as possible is to listen to scientists.

Unfortunately, that is something Trump, McConnell, and their Republican cronies have no interest in doing.

They're playing a dangerous game with people's lives. **We prefer listening to scientists.**

[Let us know if you agree with Dr. Fauci that states should adhere to federal guidelines before opening up->](https://secure.314action.%3D/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.314action.org/page/s/fauci-poll-may-2020?firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&city=&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&&&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=4+-+Let+us+know+if+you+agree+with+Dr+Fauci+t&utm_campaign=314_EM_SV_200502_1MO_1MC_STD_none_4_faucipoll&source=314_EM_SV_200502_1MO_1MC_STD_none_4_faucipoll&refcode=314_EM_SV_200502_1MO_1MC_STD_none_4_faucipoll")

[Yes](https://secure.314action.%3D/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.314action.org/page/s/fauci-poll-may-2020?firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&city=&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&&&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=5+-+Yes&utm_campaign=314_EM_SV_200502_1MO_1MC_STD_none_4_faucipoll&source=314_EM_SV_200502_1MO_1MC_STD_none_4_faucipoll&refcode=314_EM_SV_200502_1MO_1MC_STD_none_4_faucipoll")

body:

name: Gina Raimondo
subject: Emergency rental assistance for Rhode Islanders
body:
Your daily Rhode Island COVID-19 update
---
| | | | | |
---
| Hello friend,
This crisis is hitting those who can least afford it the hardest. There are many folks out there who are finding themselves in difficult financial positions and are worried about paying their bills and affording a place to live. No one should have to worry about this right now. Today, I want to tell you about our new emergency rental assistance program to help Rhode Islanders get through this crisis.
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001vtKNJbhQbA744jLlACS2QJQb5XPn7nz4Jc4mHdJ4AcBAzr--CbSlzh_NbnPGrPl_YO5dWP0QmwSwx_6WZDwO5w7-2zfrSBx4qFUwpYyQ7VUjtAyRyQulQbuRca-uW515HMOMgzZ28srYW7js0e0h0ivt2U1IVJbztI5U61cW_tYCfy19G-j62slk7vKk1-YDdHypYuB_TwA=&c=7Uzy4MWknsB_F7s_ZIN1HxqvFgb7AgI6S1iOUkHR3CedGJMmcKfg8g==&ch=bEwph3kMchZzRdLdmPCFCWt4w5R4VXM4A6ezsd1ZwT_6ZnSt4fFqQw==)
---
| To stay up to date with Rhode Island's latest COVID-19 statistics, please check the Department of Health's [new data dashboard](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001vtKNJbhQbA744jLlACS2QJQb5XPn7nz4Jc4mHdJ4AcBAzr--CbSlzh_NbnPGrPl_YO5dWP0QmwSwx_6WZDwO5w7-2zfrSBx4qFUwpYyQ7VUjtAyRyQulQbuRca-uW515HMOMgzZ28srYW7js0e0h0ivt2U1IVJbztI5U61cW_tYCfy19G-j62slk7vKk1-YDdHypYuB_TwA=&c=7Uzy4MWknsB_F7s_ZIN1HxqvFgb7AgI6S1iOUkHR3CedGJMmcKfg8g==&ch=bEwph3kMchZzRdLdmPCFCWt4w5R4VXM4A6ezsd1ZwT_6ZnSt4fFqQw==) for all the information you need about the spread of coronavirus in Rhode Island.
---
| I'm proud to announce that we have $1.5 million in emergency rental assistance available to low-income renters who have been impacted by the COVID-19 emergency and are at immediate risk of homelessness. Those who qualify can receive a grant of up to $5,000 to support past due rent payments and other fees. It's important to emphasize that this is for people who are already behind on their rent due as a result of COVID-19. It's my hope that this fund will allow us to alleviate the burden of the low-income workers who have been hit hardest by this crisis.
Starting today, you can go to [HousingHelpRI.com](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001vtKNJbhQbA744jLlACS2QJQb5XPn7nz4Jc4mHdJ4AcBAzr--CbSlziWBpLOACmosxtG3V_jpZafsYHUyP7HRWI9iyF2KOsWjUdTYtcFwqZ6k3wcH2iIYFhdYLyA4G1UnqBhLSMoIILJB2zX8fEoZ5Q==&c=7Uzy4MWknsB_F7s_ZIN1HxqvFgb7AgI6S1iOUkHR3CedGJMmcKfg8g==&ch=bEwph3kMchZzRdLdmPCFCWt4w5R4VXM4A6ezsd1ZwT_6ZnSt4fFqQw==) to view the requirements and apply. If you don't have consistent access to the internet and have questions about the application process, you can call the United Way at 211 for more help.
This crisis is also affecting homeowners in Rhode Island, and so I also want to remind everyone that more than 20 financial institutions in RI have signed a pledge that provides relief to residential borrowers. All of the participating institutions are listed on the [DBR website](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001vtKNJbhQbA744jLlACS2QJQb5XPn7nz4Jc4mHdJ4AcBAzr--CbSlzjYXkPtPq7XfVsIWpF4Ml85Lej9VEq9MEnAdYTo9aw4u1aV6dwXIPl0K-D-JD-dAIm-0BBuLdyZTP_EQRantRT4=&c=7Uzy4MWknsB_F7s_ZIN1HxqvFgb7AgI6S1iOUkHR3CedGJMmcKfg8g==&ch=bEwph3kMchZzRdLdmPCFCWt4w5R4VXM4A6ezsd1ZwT_6ZnSt4fFqQw==). As a reminder, they're offering:

* A 90-day grace period for all residential mortgage payments for individuals impacted by COVID-19, with the opportunity to request additional relief
* An agreement to not report late payments to credit reporting agencies for residential borrowers who take advantage of this relief
* A 60-day moratorium on initiating residential foreclosures and evictions; and
* An agreement to waive mortgage-related late fees.

This is a perfect example of people stepping up to do the right thing and help others in a time of need. That's what's going to get us through this crisis.
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001vtKNJbhQbA744jLlACS2QJQb5XPn7nz4Jc4mHdJ4AcBAzr--CbSlziWBpLOACmosw6j4s_B0KJomcOIdMP1RTYA8gsHT8TKGfPFf09LKDR3RozrhFUZre7yNVPOtRB2hxjGNnL8vJAx-jLl-WjpoENV7_RjxADjCVkVYc1l2nwWM77l8_i3HSH-cVX6p31AMKNWKeUQtL7k=&c=7Uzy4MWknsB_F7s_ZIN1HxqvFgb7AgI6S1iOUkHR3CedGJMmcKfg8g==&ch=bEwph3kMchZzRdLdmPCFCWt4w5R4VXM4A6ezsd1ZwT_6ZnSt4fFqQw==)
---
| We've all had to sacrifice through this crisis in big ways and small ways, and I know that it's becoming more and more challenging every day to continue social distancing. We all miss seeing our friends and our extended families. However, we need to keep going. If we do, we're going to be in a better place to move along with our reopening, and throughout the summer we'll be able to safely get together with the people we love and miss. But we're not there yet. Please, do the right thing and continue to follow the stay at home order.
-Gina Raimondo Governor
P.S.: Information is our greatest weapon in the fight against COVID-19, If you or someone you know wants to sign up to receive these emails, you can use [this link](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001vtKNJbhQbA744jLlACS2QJQb5XPn7nz4Jc4mHdJ4AcBAzr--CbSlziWBpLOACmosBXMNwEwikKOxchwqenhN__MwocsGQqvXT8jOpoLr0qNufIAVG3zJQ_q-81oVVS13fv7QgUDyCv3NS0lYnSc7gXuc4jXmcX0MwhBdEFu67paWDNQP2oB8HqthVZj0PIH4Dl5q2rxfHwROcyoOAWNmny8uGTtk6UdvQnWYyl0oREBw7OWH9sURJmMCgR65IsgJJzIxye8JDsilZ3vcRL7qTQDc7g0BojAU9OvNorOWZMcL2KDePfn3N7sLvZqKcnhCNq6pSXQECUI=&c=7Uzy4MWknsB_F7s_ZIN1HxqvFgb7AgI6S1iOUkHR3CedGJMmcKfg8g==&ch=bEwph3kMchZzRdLdmPCFCWt4w5R4VXM4A6ezsd1ZwT_6ZnSt4fFqQw==).
---

clean_body: Your daily Rhode Island COVID-19 update | | | | | | | Hello friend, This crisis is hitting those who can least afford it the hardest. There are many folks out there who are finding themselves in difficult financial positions and are worried about paying their bills and affording a place to live. No one should have to worry about this right now. Today, I want to tell you about our new emergency rental assistance program to help Rhode Islanders get through this crisis. | == | To stay up to date with Rhode Island's latest COVID-19 statistics, please check the Department of Health's == for all the information you need about the spread of coronavirus in Rhode Island. | I'm proud to announce that we have $1.5 million in emergency rental assistance available to low-income renters who have been impacted by the COVID-19 emergency and are at immediate risk of homelessness. Those who qualify can receive a grant of up to $5,000 to support past due rent payments and other fees. It's important to emphasize that this is for people who are already behind on their rent due as a result of COVID-19. It's my hope that this fund will allow us to alleviate the burden of the low-income workers who have been hit hardest by this crisis. Starting today, you can go to == to view the requirements and apply. If you don't have consistent access to the internet and have questions about the application process, you can call the United Way at 211 for more help. This crisis is also affecting homeowners in Rhode Island, and so I also want to remind everyone that more than 20 financial institutions in RI have signed a pledge that provides relief to residential borrowers. All of the participating institutions are listed on the ==. As a reminder, they're offering: A 90-day grace period for all residential mortgage payments for individuals impacted by COVID-19, with the opportunity to request additional relief An agreement to not report late payments to credit reporting agencies for residential borrowers who take advantage of this relief A 60-day moratorium on initiating residential foreclosures and evictions; and An agreement to waive mortgage-related late fees. This is a perfect example of people stepping up to do the right thing and help others in a time of need. That's what's going to get us through this crisis. | == | We've all had to sacrifice through this crisis in big ways and small ways, and I know that it's becoming more and more challenging every day to continue social distancing. We all miss seeing our friends and our extended families. However, we need to keep going. If we do, we're going to be in a better place to move along with our reopening, and throughout the summer we'll be able to safely get together with the people we love and miss. But we're not there yet. Please, do the right thing and continue to follow the stay at home order. -Gina Raimondo Governor P.S.: Information is our greatest weapon in the fight against COVID-19, If you or someone you know wants to sign up to receive these emails, you can use ==. | | Governor's Office | 82 Smith Street, Providence, RI 02903 | | Sent by mailto:communications@governor.ri.gov in collaboration with |

| | Peter, the Senate is going back to Washington next week. And with 3.8 MILLION Americans filing for unemployment in the last WEEK alone, there's a lot to do to get the country back on track. **But we just heard that McConnell isn 't going back to pass COVID-19 legislation. He is instead putting Senators in danger to...confirm conservative judges?!** [](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d04c1/72412298/4f974e83/610493c0/4148394397/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "http://go.protectvoting.org/page/s/VPP_EM_EN_200403_SenateCOVID_U1_X1?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=2&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_200503_SenateCOVID_U1_X1&source=VPP_EM_EN_200503_SenateCOVID_U1_X1") We're beyond FURIOUS. Americans need help now! We can't just wait for when it's convenient for GOP operatives. That's why we are calling for McConnell to address the crisis IMMEDIATELY on the Senate's return. [**Will you join us by signing our petition today?**](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d04c1/72412298/4f974e83/610493c3/4148394397/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://go.protectvoting.org/page/s/VPP_EM_EN_200403_SenateCOVID_U1_X1?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=3+-+Will+you+join+us+by+signing+our+petition&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_200503_SenateCOVID_U1_X1&source=VPP_EM_EN_200503_SenateCOVID_U1_X1") [](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d04c1/72412298/4f974e83/610493c2/4148394397/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "http://go.protectvoting.org/page/s/VPP_EM_EN_200403_SenateCOVID_U1_X1?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=4&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_200503_SenateCOVID_U1_X1&source=VPP_EM_EN_200503_SenateCOVID_U1_X1") **We 're not alone, America's dad is calling McConnell out as well!** [](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d04c1/72412298/4f974e83/610493c5/4148394397/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "http://go.protectvoting.org/page/s/VPP_EM_EN_200403_SenateCOVID_U1_X1?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=5&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_200503_SenateCOVID_U1_X1&source=VPP_EM_EN_200503_SenateCOVID_U1_X1") **We 're joining Sen. Kaine in calling out McConnell's recklessness. It's obvious -- COVID-19 legislation NEEDS to be at the top of the docket next week. **[**Will you join us in DEMANDING Mitch Mcconnell bring more relief to Americans in need?**](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d04c1/72412298/4f974e83/610493c4/4148394397/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://go.protectvoting.org/page/s/VPP_EM_EN_200403_SenateCOVID_U1_X1?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=6+-+Will+you+join+us+in+DEMANDING+Mitch+Mcco&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_200503_SenateCOVID_U1_X1&source=VPP_EM_EN_200503_SenateCOVID_U1_X1") | | | [DEMAND ACTION NOW>>](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d04c1/72412298/4f974e83/610493c7/4148394397/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "http://go.protectvoting.org/page/s/VPP_EM_EN_200403_SenateCOVID_U1_X1?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=7+-+DEMAND+ACTION+NOWgtgt&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_200503_SenateCOVID_U1_X1&source=VPP_EM_EN_200503_SenateCOVID_U1_X1")

Friend, this is a _big_ deal.

After hearing that our opponent, Kelly Loeffler (R), started flooding this race with $20 MILLION of her personal fortune - and that we fell short of our critical $50,000 goal - **a group of donors stepped up to EXTEND our match!**
**If we want _any_ chance at flipping Georgia blue and taking back the Senate for Democrats, we need to take advantage of this incredible opportunity to have _every dollar doubled_ before it expires at midnight.**
Here's the thing: National Journal says that Georgia's Senate race is _one of the most competitive races_ in the 2020 cycle - and a Trump-linked super PAC just named us a TOP target, meaning they'll do whatever it takes to win.
Nate Silver's FiveThirtyEight says Democrats CAN flip Georgia blue and take back the Senate this year - but we need your immediate grassroots support to get it done.
