name: MJ Hegar Battleground HQ
subject: DC bosses vs. the people
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
Senators should be working for the people, not special interests and DC bosses.

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648900cd/7f51f7bc/4fee99b6/4ef1679f/156162744/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | | [](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648900cd/7f51f7bc/4fee99b6/4ef1679e/156162744/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEzNDMifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-runoff?refcode=email_20200502.3nd__1343__&amount=10")
---
Peter -- Over Sen. Cornyn's 18 years in Washington, he's put in hard work -- but it's been for the special interests and his DC bosses like Mitch McConnell, NOT the people of Texas.

**Sen. Cornyn voted 20 times to repeal the Affordable Care Act, even though Texas has the highest uninsured rate in the entire country. **
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648900cd/7f51f7bc/4fee99b6/4ef1679e/156162744/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEzNDMifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-runoff?refcode=email_20200502.3nd__1343__&amount=10")
---
**He stood in lockstep with Mitch McConnell as the Senate refused to take meaningful action on gun violence, even after horrific mass shootings in our own state.** Sen. Cornyn even stood in the way of efforts to stop perpetrators of domestic abuse from getting guns. **[Donate to help elect a senator who won't be afraid to stand up to domestic violence.](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648900cd/7f51f7bc/4fee99b6/4ef1679e/156162744/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEzNDMifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-runoff?refcode=email_20200502.3nd__1343__&amount=10")**
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648900cd/7f51f7bc/4fee99b6/4ef1679e/156162744/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEzNDMifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-runoff?refcode=email_20200502.3nd__1343__&amount=10")
---
**We _need_ to get Sen. Cornyn out of the Senate -- and elect a fighter who won't be afraid to stand up for what's right in his place. [Pitch in to make it happen!](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648900cd/7f51f7bc/4fee99b6/4ef1679e/156162744/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEzNDMifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-runoff?refcode=email_20200502.3nd__1343__&amount=10")**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

name: =?utf-8?Q?Team=20Amash?=
subject: Why he's running
disclaimer_text: Paid for by AMASH FOR AMERICA EXPLORATORY COMMITTEE**
body:
Justin is running for president for one simple reason: To win for the people. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/amashforamerica/why-hes-running?e=b1055dcfe8)
---
| | [ ](https://amashforamerica.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a50869b1d817b7ebb49c6b579&id=cd6bdcf0db&e=b1055dcfe8)
---
| |

Justin is running for president for one simple reason:

**To win for the people.**

Justin knows there are millions of Americans who are looking for something different. Most Americans are not represented by the Republican or Democratic parties. They recognize that the two-party system is fueling corruption and breeding contempt.

They're turned off by the partisan bitterness, and they're tired of the way Washington can't seem to function except when it's trying to give out special favors to well-connected corporations or interest groups.

Most Americans want a president who actually represents them and shares their values. They want to have a meaningful voice in the policy decisions that affect their lives. They want their rights protected, and they want equality before the law.

That's the majority of the country, and it's more than enough voters to win the White House—if we can reach them. [**Pitch in now to help get Justin's message to the people.**](https://amashforamerica.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a50869b1d817b7ebb49c6b579&id=fd1f20634b&e=b1055dcfe8)
---
|
---
| [DONATE NOW >>](https://amashforamerica.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a50869b1d817b7ebb49c6b579&id=5937eb09f7&e=b1055dcfe8 "DONATE NOW >>")
---
| Any amount you can give will help spread the word: **There's now a candidate in the race who actually represents a majority of Americans and will deliver the serious, principled leadership we deserve.**

As Justin launched his campaign with interviews and press appearances this week, the stark contrast between him and the other candidates was obvious. **There is no other candidate in the race with the temperament and integrity to lead our country and get us off the path of partisanship and dysfunction.

[Contribute now to help get the word out.](https://amashforamerica.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a50869b1d817b7ebb49c6b579&id=a46dc88fe6&e=b1055dcfe8)**

—Team Amash
---
| | | | | | | [](https://amashforamerica.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a50869b1d817b7ebb49c6b579&id=824938dbbf&e=b1055dcfe8)
---
| | [](https://amashforamerica.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a50869b1d817b7ebb49c6b579&id=b51b5142ea&e=b1055dcfe8)

name: Team Christy
subject: OFFICIAL 2020 House Majority DEFENDER RECORD
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Christy Smith for Congress
body:
| []()
---

| | Peter,

The election is in 10 days. Every minute counts, and we need your help.

**Our campaign set an essential goal of $1 million last Friday,** and we're doing well, but we're not where we need to be.

We're checking our records to make sure everyone knows how important this deadline is to our House majority. Here's what we have associated with this email address for online donations:

| **OFFICIAL 2020 House Majority DEFENDER RECORD**

**Name:** Peter Willis
**Email:** dpwillis67@gmail.com
**House Majority Defender status:** **Not Yet**

**[Suggested Action: Make your first donation -- chip in $5 or more and help close the gap on our final fundraising goal.](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bb29/29776869/a466bcd/569f7f4b/877708705/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA1MDJfbWlsbGlvbmdvYWw0LVMxIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2005_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200502_milliongoal4-S1")**
[DONATE](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bb29/29776869/a466bcd/569f7f4b/877708705/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA1MDJfbWlsbGlvbmdvYWw0LVMxIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2005_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200502_milliongoal4-S1")
---

The pressure is on. Donald Trump is funneling resources into this race in the hopes of tearing down our majority in the House. If we don't prepare for the tidal wave of GOP money by matching their spending, it will be a resounding message to GOP donors across the country:

**"The House is up for grabs"**
With only 10 days left to hit our goals and beat Mike Garcia, we need your help now more than ever.

**[Chip in $5 or whatever you can afford to crush these fundraising goals and protect our majority in the House.](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bb29/29776869/a466bcd/569f7f4b/877708705/VEsC/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA1MDJfbWlsbGlvbmdvYWw0LVMxIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2005_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200502_milliongoal4-S1")**
[DONATE](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bb29/29776869/a466bcd/569f7f4b/877708705/VEsD/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA1MDJfbWlsbGlvbmdvYWw0LVMxIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2005_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200502_milliongoal4-S1")
Thank you,

Team Christy

P.S. Have you donated offline, recently, or with a different email address? If so, thank you! That donation may not be reflected in your record above, but we are working hard to update our data. And if you think we've made an error, you can reply to this email.
[DONATE](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bb29/29776869/a466bcd/569f7f4b/877708705/VEsA/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA1MDJfbWlsbGlvbmdvYWw0LVMxIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2005_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200502_milliongoal4-S1")

_The number one priority during this time is to make sure everyone helps mitigate the spread of COVID-19 in California and across the country. Our campaign is doing our part by canceling all in-person events, moving to a digital operation, and supporting local efforts to help those in need. Emails like this are a critical part of our ability to run a strong campaign that can win._

| | Paid for by Christy Smith for Congress.
---|---
|
This email was sent by **[Christy Smith](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bb29/29776869/a466bcd/569f7f44/877708705/VEsB/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://www.christyforcongress.org/")**
777 S. Figueroa Street, Suite 4050, Los Angeles, CA 90017-5864.

If you no longer want to hear from Christy Smith, [**click here to get off all our lists instantly.**](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bb29/29776869/a466bcd/569f7f45/877708705/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.christyforcongress.org/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com") Questions or concerns? [**Contact us here**](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bb29/29776869/a466bcd/569f7f46/877708705/VEsP/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://www.christyforcongress.org/contact"). |
